spec_match.rationale: Calls element.startViewTransition() on a card vs document.startViewTransition() on the whole page - exactly the spec contrast.

interactive.rationale: 3 interactive markers - clicking cards triggers different transitions.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Blurb promises element vs document comparison; the page delivers.

edge_cases.rationale: Doesn't cover what happens when element-scoped transition's element is removed mid-flight.

references.rationale: Includes the correct chromestatus.com/feature/5109852273377280 link in see-also.

openQuestions.title: Demonstrate concurrent firing
openQuestions.detail: Click both cards in rapid succession - the page lede mentions this but doesn't visualise it. Add a counter showing simultaneous transitions in flight.

openQuestions.title: Show transition cleanup on element removal
openQuestions.detail: What happens if you remove the card mid-transition? The spec has cleanup rules; demonstrate.

summary: Right framing - element vs document - but still missing the concurrent-firing visualisation that makes element-scoped's value obvious.
